with:
  # Combine all clauses into a single sentence
      if clauses:
          sentence = ", ".join(clauses) + "."
          # Capitalise first character
          return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]
      # Fallback: if no clauses were generated (e.g., unknown predicates), concatenate raw triples
      fallback_parts = []
      for t in triples:
          if isinstance(t, Triple):
              s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object
          elif isinstance(t, (list, tuple)) and len(t) == 3:
              s, p, o = t
          else:
              continue
          fallback_parts.append(f"{s} {p} {o}")
      fallback_sentence = "; ".join(fallback_parts) + "."
      return fallback_sentence[0].upper() + fallback_sentence[1:] if fallback_sentence else ""
